snippet.title: LA BATAILLE DE GAULLE - Bande-annonce Officielle HD
snippet.description:
Deux films de Antonin BAUDRY, avec : Simon ABKARIAN, Simon RUSSELL BEALE, Florian LESIEUR, Benoît MAGIMEL, Mathieu KASSOVITZ, Loïc CORBERY, Anamaria VARTOLOMEI, Niels SCHNEIDER, Félix KYSYL, Karim LEKLOU, Tom MISON, Kacey MOTTET KLEIN, Thierry LHERMITTE, Campbell SCOTT, Grégoire COLIN, Daniel BETTS, Pip TORRENS, Stephen CAMPBELL MOORE, Anthony CALF
 
LA BATAILLE DE GAULLE : L’ÂGE DE FER - au cinéma le 3 juin 2026 / https://www.pathefilms.com/fr/films/la-bataille-de-gaulle-lage-de-fer/
LA BATAILLE DE GAULLE : J’ÉCRIS TON NOM - au cinéma le 3 juillet 2026 / https://www.pathefilms.com/fr/films/la-bataille-de-gaulle-jecris-ton-nom/
 
Juin 1940. La France s'effondre et signe l’armistice. Au milieu du chaos, un homme refuse de céder. Seul contre tous, ce général inconnu s'échappe vers Londres pour sauver ce qu'il reste d'un rêve : la liberté. 
Sans armée, sans appui, sans espoir. Mais avec une folle conviction : la France, sa France, n'a pas déposé les armes. Il tente un ultime pari : convaincre le monde que la bataille de France n'est ni terminée, ni perdue. 
La réalité est têtue, et lui donne tort. Mais peu à peu se lèvent autour de lui en Angleterre, en France et en Afrique des résistants de l'ombre, des lycéens révoltés, des soldats déterminés. Leur foi, leur audace, leur rage de liberté défient l'Histoire qui semblait pourtant écrite d’avance.

snippet.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: Worldwide Reveal Showcase
snippet.description:
Available July 9, 2026 on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S and PC: https://ubi.li/O5sQ5

Learn more about Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced as Matt Ryan, Richard Knight, Paul Fu and Jean Guesdon take you behind the scenes of its development in this 30‑minute showcase showcasing work-in-progress gameplay and cinematics. From the recreated Caribbean to enhanced gameplay and technical improvements, with a peek at new narrative content exclusive to the remake, the developers reveal the creative vision behind Black Flag and much more.

Learn more: https://assassinscreedblackflagresynced.com

About Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced:
Rebuilt from the ground up and powered by the latest Anvil engine, the iconic solo pirate adventure returns.  Sail the Caribbean as Edward Kenway during the Golden Age of Piracy in this faithfully enhanced remake featuring stunning visuals, upgraded gameplay, and new content. As you follow Edward in his pursuit of glory and gold, you’ll be drawn into an ancient war separating Assassins and Templars, with the fate of everything the pirates have built hanging in the balance.

Raise the Black Flag and let your reign over the seas begin.

#AssassinsCreed

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

localized.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
localized.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: Conan Exiles Enhanced – Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Conan Exiles Enhanced is a FREE upgrade to Conan Exiles arriving May 5th 2026 on Steam. The upgrade will be available to all current and future owners of Conan Exiles on Steam to celebrate the 8th year anniversary of the beloved open world survival game. Built in Unreal Engine 5, Conan Exiles Enhanced brings eight years of incredible survival content into a fully upgraded experience with dramatically improved visuals, enhanced performance, modern rendering technology and for the first time connecting the Exiled Lands to the expansion Isle of Siptah*. The update revitalizes the brutal world of Conan Exiles, delivering a deeper level of immersion for both new players and long-time fans.

For more information, please visit https://bit.ly/ConanEnhanced , where a detailed FAQ is available in our Conan Exiles Enhanced announcement article under the News section.

* Requires purchase of the Isle of Siptah expansion

snippet.title: Star City — Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
In the race for glory, every secret has gravity. Star City premieres May 29 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_StarCity

A bold new chapter inspired by the critically acclaimed space-race drama, “For All Mankind,” “Star City” is a propulsive paranoid thriller that takes us back to the key moment in the alt-history retelling of the space race — when the Soviet Union became the first nation to put a man on the moon. But this time, we explore the story from behind the Iron Curtain, showing the lives of the cosmonauts, the engineers and the intelligence officers embedded among them in the Soviet space program, and the risks they all took to propel humankind forward.

#brawlstars #bs #supercellcreator #keepbrawlalive #newbrawler

Brawl Stars est un jeu mobile multijoueur développé par Supercell. Il propose des affrontements rapides et dynamiques en 3 contre 3 ou en solo, avec des parties courtes et intenses.
Le joueur incarne des Brawlers, chacun possédant des capacités, attaques et super-pouvoirs uniques. Le jeu offre de nombreux modes de jeu (Razzia de gemmes, Brawl Ball, Survivant, Zone réservée, etc.), renouvelés régulièrement.
Au-delà de l’aspect compétitif, Brawl Stars se distingue par son univers riche et mystérieux, son lore caché, et une forte scène esport internationale. Accessible mais stratégique, le jeu récompense aussi bien la maîtrise individuelle que le travail d’équipe.

snippet.description:
Aujourd'hui, mon pote va tester mes tours de 10 secondes VS 10 minutes VS 1 heure dans une bataille de construction des plus épiques ! Arrivera-t-il au bout de mes pièges et autres malices ? Regardez la vidéo pour le savoir (ou vivez avec le fait de ne jamais savoir)
Mail pour tout contact commercial : azpaztv@gmail.com
Mon Twitter : https://www.twitter.com/azpaztv
Mon Discord  + de nulcraft : https://discord.gg/EBPCS6YF9e
Merci pour les 700k road to 800k
Ce n'est pas Minecraft, Mais l'eau monte ou Minecraft, mais la lave monte, ou Survivre 100 jours dans Minecraft, ou tout type de défi dans Minecraft mais. Il s'agit d'un speedrun / Manhunt . Shorts ou sur Roblox avec des Brainrot Italien de Steal a brainrot grow a garden ou 99 nuits en forêt c'est des jeux de fou surtout vole un brainrot roblox fr
Dans cette vidéo Minecraft 1.20 (1.21 et non 1.19, 1.18 ou 1.17), je répondrai à toutes les questions que vous me poserez sans faire une seule exception. Il y a des questions embarrassantes, des questions intéressantes et beaucoup d'entre elles tout simplement stupides XD Cette vidéo est l'une de mes préférées que j'ai faites, alors profitez-en :)

Ce n'est pas Minecraft dans la vraie vie, pas l'édition éducative de Minecraft, pas Minecraft, mais en difficulté millionaire de riche. ou alors 7 façons de voler mes amis Cela répond à vos questions les plus litigieuses/absurdes.

Je vous aime tous beaucoup!
